title: NA-Non ULIP
word_text:
What is Direct Term Life Insurance?
Meta description: If you’re planning to purchase a term plan in the near future, ensure that it is a direct term life insurance policy. Wondering what it is? Here’s everything you need to know.
Keywords: what is a term insurance plan, best term plan, direct term life insurance, direct term insurance
When it comes to protecting your loved ones financially, a term insurance policy is the best option that you currently have. Not only is it very affordable, but it is also extremely customizable as well. If providing financial protection to your family is something that’s been on your mind, then make sure that you invest in a direct term life insurance plan right away. Wondering what direct term insurance is and how it is different from a regular term plan? Continue reading to find out.
What is a Term Insurance Plan?
But before we actually proceed to the concept of direct term life insurance, let’s quickly revisit term insurance.
A term insurance plan is a contract between an individual and an insurance provider. Here, the insurance provider agrees to provide a life cover of a predetermined sum to the individual for a specific period of time. In exchange, the individual agrees to make regular payments to the insurer in the form of premiums.
Now, when the said individual dies within the specific period of time as laid out in the terms of the insurance policy, the insurer will pay the agreed upon predetermined sum to the deceased individual’s family. The affected family can then use this sum of money to take care of their expenses and further their life goals as they see fit.
Everything you need to know about Direct Term Life Insurance
So what then is a direct term life insurance? We’ll get to it in a bit. Before that, let’s take a look at how term insurance plans are typically sold to individuals.
Now typically, individuals wishing to purchase a term life insurance plan, do so by approaching an agent of an insurance provider. This agent acts as the connecting link between the individual and the insurer. He not only explains the features and benefits offered by the term plan, but also is responsible for ensuring that the policy is successfully disbursed to the individual.
While this is one way to purchase a term life insurance, there’s also another option available to individuals as well. This method involves purchasing a term plan directly from the insurance provider themselves, completely bypassing agents. Since you get to purchase directly from the insurer themselves, it is termed as a direct term life insurance plan.
Benefits of Direct Term Life Insurance
Now that you know what a direct term life insurance plan is, here’s a quick look at a few of the benefits that you get to enjoy by opting for such a policy.
Convenience
A direct term insurance plan can be purchased straight from an insurance service provider through their website. Since the entire process can be done online, you can purchase the best term plan right from the comfort of your own home at a time that’s most convenient to you. That’s not all. You can also save precious time and energy since you don’t have to physically visit any branch or an agent.
Quick and easy purchase
Now, since direct term insurance can be bought online, the entire purchase process can be completed within just a few minutes. All that you would have to do is fill an online insurance proposal form, attach scanned copies of all the relevant documents, and make the first premium payment. The term plan will immediately be approved and a copy of it delivered to you via email instantly.
Complete transparency
With direct term life insurance plans, you don’t have to worry about unscrupulous agents trying to sell policies by hiding or misrepresenting information. All of the information regarding the insurance policy along with its terms and conditions are fully available on the website of the insurance service provider.
You are free to inspect any and all aspects of the policy thoroughly before making a purchase decision. That’s not all. If you have any queries or clarifications that you need, you can always get in touch with the customer support of the insurance provider through multiple channels.
Affordability
Did you know that direct term life insurance plans come with lower premiums compared to the ones you purchase through agents? By purchasing a term plan online, you save on many costs such as the agent’s commission, distribution cost, documentation cost, logistics, and stationery, among other things.
The benefit of these savings are transferred to you, the policyholder, through a reduction in your premium. Some insurance providers also provide an additional discount on the premiums for purchasing term plans directly through them.
Safety and security
Nowadays, individuals have ceased to worry about the safety and security of online payment methods. The entire online payment mechanism is highly secure and encrypted, making sure that no one can gain unauthorized access to any of the sensitive and confidential information. Also, you don’t have to worry about agents trying to trick you into making fraudulent transactions.
Why choose it?
There are several reasons why you should opt for direct term insurance instead of going through the more traditional route. Here’s a quick look at a few of them.
Since you’re effectively approaching the insurer directly, you don’t have to go through an agent. This can save you precious time, money, and energy.
You don’t have to deal with agents pushing you towards a particular term insurance plan. Instead, you can compare various plans by yourself and choose the one that fits your needs and requirements at your own time and convenience.
Every single step of the application process is transparent and the updates are provided instantaneously. You don’t have to constantly contact your agent to get information on the status of your policy.
Conclusion
With this, hope you are now aware of direct term insurance. As you can see, the advantages offered by these kinds of plans are many and far outweigh those offered by offline term policies.
Disclaimer:
The views stated in this article is not to be construed as investment advice and readers are suggested to seek independent financial advice before making any investment decisions. For more details on risk factors, terms and conditions please read sales brochure & policy document (available on www.bajajallianzlife.com) carefully before concluding a sale.

What is Direct Term Life Insurance? Meta description: If you’re planning to purchase a term plan in the near future, ensure that it is a direct term life insurance policy. Wondering what it is? Here’s everything you need to know. Keywords: what is a term insurance plan, best term plan, direct term life insurance, direct term insurance
When it comes to protecting your loved ones financially, a term insurance policy is one of the preferred option that you currently have. Not only is it very affordable, but it is also extremely customizable as well. If providing financial protection to your family is something that’s been on your mind, then make sure that you consider investing in a direct term life insurance plan. Wondering what direct term insurance is and how it is different from a regular term plan? Continue reading to find out. What is a Term Insurance Plan? But before we actually proceed to the concept of direct term life insurance, let’s quickly revisit term insurance. A term insurance plan is a contract between an individual and an insurance provider. Here, the insurance provider agrees to provide a life cover of a predetermined sum to the individual for a specific period of time. In exchange, the individual agrees to make regular payments to the insurer in the form of premiums. Now, when the said individual dies within the specific period of time as laid out in the terms of the insurance policy, the insurer will pay the agreed upon predetermined sum to the deceased individual’s nominee. The affected nominee can then use this sum of money to take care of their expenses and further their life goals as they see fit. Everything you need to know about Direct Term Life Insurance So what is a direct term life insurance? We’ll get to it in a bit. Before that, let’s take a look at how term insurance plans are typically sold to individuals. Now typically, individuals wishing to purchase a term life insurance plan, do so by approaching an agent of an insurance provider. This agent acts as the connecting link between the individual and the insurer. He not only checks suitability and explains the features and benefits offered by the term plan, but also is responsible for ensuring that the policy is successfully disbursed to the individual. While this is one way to purchase a term life insurance, there’s also another option available to individuals as well. This method involves purchasing a term plan directly from the insurance provider themselves, completely bypassing agents. Since you get to purchase directly from the insurer themselves, it is termed as a direct term life insurance plan.
Benefits of Direct Term Life Insurance Now that you know what a direct term life insurance plan is, here’s a quick look at a few of the benefits that you get to enjoy by opting for such a policy.
1. Convenience
A direct term insurance plan can be purchased straight from an insurance service provider through their website. Since the entire process can be done online, you can purchase a suitable term plan right from the comfort of your own home at a time that’s most convenient to you. That’s not all. You can also save time and energy since you don’t have to physically visit any branch or an agent. 2. Quick and easy purchase
Now, since direct term insurance can be bought online, the entire purchase process can be completed within just a few minutes. All that you would have to do is fill an online insurance proposal form, attach scanned copies of all the relevant documents, and make the first premium payment. The term plan will be approved, if all the underwriting and other requirements are met and documents are verified, and a copy of it delivered to you via your registered email. 3. Complete transparency
With direct term life insurance plans, you can avoid unscrupulous agents who are trying to sell policies by hiding or misrepresenting information. All of the information regarding the insurance policy along with its terms and conditions are fully available on the website of the insurance service provider. You are free to inspect any and all aspects of the policy thoroughly before making a purchase decision. That’s not all. If you have any queries or clarifications that you need, you can always get in touch with the customer support of the insurance provider through multiple channels. 4. Affordability
Did you know that direct term life insurance plans come with lower premiums compared to the ones you purchase through agents? By purchasing a term plan online, you save on many costs such as the agent’s commission, distribution cost, documentation cost, logistics, and stationery, among other things. The benefit of these savings are transferred to you, the policyholder, through a reduction in your premium. Some insurance providers also provide an additional discount on the premiums for purchasing term plans directly through them. 5. Safety and security
Nowadays, individuals have ceased to worry about the safety and security of online payment methods. The entire online payment mechanism is highly secure and encrypted, making sure that
no one can gain unauthorized access to any of the sensitive and confidential information. Also, you don’t have to worry about agents trying to trick you into making fraudulent transactions. Why choose it? There are several reasons why you should consider opting for direct term insurance instead of going through the more traditional route. Here’s a quick look at a few of them.
1. Since you’re effectively approaching the insurer directly, you don’t have to go through an agent.
This can save you precious time, money, and energy. 2. You may avoid agents pushing you towards a particular term insurance plan. Instead, you can
compare various plans by yourself and choose the one that fits your needs and requirements at your own time and convenience. 3. Every single step of the application process is transparent and the updates are provided
instantaneously. You don’t have to constantly contact your agent to get information on the status of your policy. Conclusion With this, hope you are now aware of direct term insurance. As you can see, the advantages offered by these kinds of plans are many..
Disclaimer: The views stated in this article is not to be construed as investment advice and readers are suggested to seek independent financial advice before making any investment decisions.
